trades.research_summary: Moderna beat EPS estimates by $0.66 and revenue expectations last quarter despite -29.8% YoY revenue decline. Historical S&P 500 earnings beat rate is ~73%. Even severely struggling companies typically beat 35-50% of the time due to conservative analyst estimate-setting. Market at 12% YES appears dramatically underpriced versus fundamental base rates.
key_factors: Historical earnings beat rate ~73% for S&P 500 companies dwarfs 12% market price
Moderna beat EPS by $0.66 and beat revenue last quarter - recent momentum
Analysts systematically set conservative estimates creating favorable beat conditions
Even at conservative 35% true prob, edge exceeds 20%
trades.bear_case: Moderna's business in serious decline; unknown negative catalysts this specific quarter; $9.9K volume suggests some informed money; resolution criteria may require beating on multiple metrics; market participants may have specific intelligence on this quarter's shortfall

trades.market: Will Lady Gaga attend the Met Gala?
trades.research_summary: Lady Gaga appears on multiple rumored guest lists, described as 'usual attendee' across several sources. No reports of scheduling conflicts, illness, or any reason for absence. Event is in 2 days.
key_factors: On rumored guest list from multiple sources
Described as 'usual attendee' with strong historical attendance
No contradictory information found
trades.bear_case: No official confirmation; celebrities can skip for undisclosed personal reasons; 'rumored' is not 'confirmed'

trades.research_summary: IONQ has beaten estimates in only 2 of last 4 quarters (50% base rate) with average negative surprise of -150% in miss quarters. Market at 90% YES appears extremely aggressive given this track record. Research highlights concern about whether revenue gains can stay ahead of steep quantum hardware expenses—the key EPS uncertainty.
key_factors: 50% historical beat rate directly contradicts 90% market pricing
Average -150% negative surprise in miss quarters shows catastrophic downside
Quantum hardware expenses create structural profitability uncertainty
Just lost on MRNA earnings—earnings markets carry unknown catalyst risk
trades.bear_case: Market may reflect information not in research: pre-announcements, lowered analyst bars, or insider confidence. 90% pricing usually reflects informed money.

trades.market: Will Montenegro advance through the first Eurovision Semi-Final?
trades.research_summary: Montenegro has historically one of the worst Eurovision qualification records (~15-20% rate vs ~63% base rate). Small country with tiny diaspora means weak televote support. Market at 55% YES appears significantly overpriced relative to historical performance.
key_factors: Montenegro qualifies roughly 15-20% historically despite 63% base rate
Small diaspora severely limits televote support
Market at 55% implies above-average qualifier which contradicts track record
10 of ~15-16 countries qualify but Montenegro consistently underperforms
trades.bear_case: No data on Montenegro's 2026 entry — could be an exceptionally strong song/artist that justifies higher odds. Market volume ($9.3K) may reflect informed bettors with knowledge of rehearsals/betting odds.

trades.market: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $82,000 on May 6?
trades.research_summary: LIVE price data shows BTC at $82,422, already $422 (0.5%) above the $82,000 threshold. Market closes today May 6 — resolution is imminent. 24h momentum is +1.98%. The 66¢ YES price appears to be stale relative to current price reality despite $94K volume.
key_factors: BTC live price $82,422 is ALREADY above $82,000 threshold
Market closes today (0d remaining) — resolution imminent or past
Positive momentum (+1.98% 24h) reduces risk of sudden dip below threshold
Crypto category has strong track record (62% WR, +$586 P&L)
trades.bear_case: Market may have already closed at 11:06 UTC (1 min ago) making trade impossible. If resolution is at a later timestamp today, BTC's 0.5% buffer could evaporate on an intraday dip. Resolution mechanics/source could differ from CoinGecko price.

trades.market: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $80,000 on May 9?
trades.research_summary: LIVE BTC price is $80,421 — only $421 (0.52%) above $80K threshold with ~22 hours remaining. BTC daily volatility of 2-3% (~$1,500-2,000) makes a sub-$80K touch statistically probable. Normal distribution model with σ≈$1,800 yields P(above at close)≈59%. Research brief also shows lower prices ($76-77K) from other sources, suggesting possible further weakness. Whale dumps of $760M recently noted.
key_factors: BTC at $80,421 — razor-thin 0.52% buffer above $80K threshold
Daily BTC volatility (~2-3%) far exceeds the buffer, giving ~40% chance of dropping below
12-24hr hold duration matches historical sweet spot (100% WR)
Recent whale selling ($760M) suggests bearish pressure
trades.bear_case: Bullish momentum (+0.87% 24h) could push BTC higher; weekend low-liquidity could amplify moves in either direction; conflicting price data means actual price might differ from live feed

trades.market: Confirmed case of Hantavirus in US by May 15?
trades.research_summary: 23+ exposed cruise passengers returned to US by May 6, at least 1 symptomatic. Lab confirmation window (3-7 days from ~May 6) falls squarely within May 9-13, with 5 days remaining before close. High-profile outbreak ensures expedited testing. Market at 46% underprices documented symptomatic cases already present in US.
key_factors: At least 1 symptomatic returnee already documented in US as of May 6
Lab confirmation window (3-7 days) puts results between now and May 13 — well before May 15 close
23+ returned passengers increases probability that at least one confirms positive
High-profile cruise outbreak ensures prioritized CDC/state lab testing
trades.bear_case: Lab turnaround could exceed 7 days; symptomatic returnee could test negative; bureaucratic delays in official 'confirmation' designation; health category is 0W/1L in history
